package.name: delivery_perception_lidar
package.description: LiDAR-based perception and automatic emergency braking for the campus delivery robot. Owner: Member 2. Contains two ROS nodes: - lidar_obstacle_node : subscribes to /scan, computes the closest forward obstacle, and publishes it on a topic. - auto_brake_node : monitors the obstacle topic, and calls the EmergencyStop service when the obstacle is too close.
